name: Frontier Airlines

carryOn.notes: Carry-on bag requires a fee. Personal item included free.

economy.notes: $35–$60+ per bag depending on when purchased.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Frontier charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, Frontier charges for carry-on bags. Only one personal item fitting under the seat is included free. Carry-on fees range from $35–$60+.

faqs.question: What is Frontier's personal item size?
faqs.answer: Personal items must be 18 x 14 x 8 inches or smaller and fit under the seat in front of you.
